applicability: Licensed banks, licensed Islamic banks and licensed investment banks, on a consolidated basis including global operations
empowerment_framework: This policy document is issued pursuant to - a) sections 47(1), 143(1) and 266 of the Financial Services Act 2013 (FSA); and
requirement: A financial institution shall establish a recovery indicator framework that sets out clearly defined criteria, thresholds, procedures and governance arrangements to facilitate timely monitoring, escalation, activation and implementation of the recovery plan.
